info.name: Recognize LLM
info.summary: Tag and describe photos with a local llama.cpp vision model
info.description:
Generates descriptive metadata for images using a locally-hosted llama.cpp vision model.
For every new upload (and, on demand, for an existing library via backfill) the app sends the image to a local OpenAI-compatible vision endpoint and writes the result back into Nextcloud as collaborative **system tags** plus a free-text **description**. Original image files are never modified. Also registered as a TaskProcessing provider so other Nextcloud AI features can reuse it.
info.author: gnome
